response.rule: Successive increments are successive prime fourth powers, starting with 3^4
a(n)=n a(n-1)+(-1)^n p_n for successive primes p_n, from the established index
Odd positions are Catalan numbers; even positions are powers of 3
Successive increments are cubes of successive composite integers
